name: Chocolate Cream Cheese Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the cream and chopped chocolate together over low heat.
2. Allow the mixture to cool until it is lukewarm.
3. Beat the cream cheese until smooth.
4. Gradually beat in the melted chocolate mixture until light and fluffy (about 2 minutes).
5. Stir in the grated orange zest.
6. Refrigerate the spread until firm before serving.
